title: [MTR4] Grand Central BR Class 221 Super Voyager
description: Resource Pack that adds Grand Central Super Voyagers into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR mod)
body:
# Overview
![grand central 221](https://i.imgur.com/XOy4WTZ.png)
The British Rail Class 221 Super Voyager is a class of tilting diesel-electric multiple unit express passenger trains built in Bruges, Belgium and Wakefield, by Bombardier Transportation in 2001–02.

The class is similar to the Class 220 Voyager, but was built with a tilting mechanism enabling up to six degrees of tilt to allow higher speeds on curved tracks. Additionally, most have five coaches, and they have a different bogie design. They have a maximum speed of 125 mph (200 km/h).

  This resource pack is to add the Grand Central (EX-Avanti West Coast) BR Class 221 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by PlaneSimple for Transport Fever 2 and Converted to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2026.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Grand Central.
